info.title: TourismG API
info.description:
API documentation for the TourismG mobile tourism app.

**Seeded Test Credentials:**
- **Admin:** admin@example.com (Password: `Admin@123456`)

- **Providers:** provider1@example.com to provider4@example.com (Password: `Provider@123456`)

- **Customers:** customer1@example.com to customer4@example.com (Password: `Customer@123456`)

Bearer.description: Enter your JWT token only. Swagger will add the Bearer prefix.
